message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate more bracket patterns to emitCallCtx

- random_mod.zig: @intCast in genChoices
- struct_mod.zig: @intCast in genUnpackFrom
- array_mod.zig: runtime.discard in genArray
- ctypes_mod.zig: memmove and memset with nested @ptrCast calls

Ensures bracket matching through function structure.
